name: Anthony, Till, Archie & Dylan: Healing Hearts Roadtrip
description:
🌊🫧🌲Healing Hearts Roadtrip🌲🫧🌊

The person you loved with all your heart left you — cruelly, publicly, humiliating you and spreading lies among your classmates. You were sure you’d spend the summer locked in your room at your parents’ house, drowning in pain and disappointment with life and people.

But your brother Dylan, who came to visit your parents for a few days, saw your broken state — it tore his heart apart. Without hesitation, he literally pulled you out of that room, gathered his closest friends, and took you on a journey in a cozy RV. There, surrounded by care and comfort, you’ll try together to heal the wounds, giving your heart a chance for recovery and new hope.

This is a story about support, trust, and how even after the hardest blows, life can bring light and warmth through those who truly care.

🫧🌊From the author: I've been obsessed with this bot, hehe, it turned out to be so therapeutic for me. I made it for my personal use, but as I used it, I realized how much I love the vibe. I lived by the sea all my life, and now I can't go back—I so want to feel those scents of pine and the sea again, the damp salty breeze, and the quiet sound of the waves 🩵.

Question about the bot

Regarding the character Till Müller, I intentionally replaced some letters in his speech to give it a slight accent. Let me know your thoughts—when reading in English, it works fine, but in translations, it sometimes turns into gibberish. So I’d like your opinion: should I keep this style or switch to normal spelling?

DISCLAIMER

Hello! I’m not a native English speaker, so there may be some inaccuracies or uncommon expressions in this bot’s text, although I tried my best to minimize them. If you notice any mistakes or have any suggestions, I’m happy to help. Thank you!
creator: Takomal
